Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MBSF Other Chronic or Potentially Disabling Conditions Segment Codebook │ August 2025 │ V 1.7 19 

DEPSN_MEDICARE 

LABEL: Major Depressive Disorders End-of-Year Indicator — Medicare Only Claims 

DESCRIPTION: This variable indicates whether a beneficiary met the condition criteria for major depressive disorders 
as of the end of the calendar year. (On the CCW website, we shorten this condition label to 
“Depressive Disorders” for
